stun_command_list.command: execute as @e[sort=furthest,limit=1,type=skeleton,distance=10..32,nbt=!{HandItems:[{id:"minecraft:bow"}]}] run execute unless score @s 001 matches 1 run indestructible @s set_phase 3
execute as @e[sort=furthest,limit=1,type=skeleton,distance=10..32,nbt=!{HandItems:[{id:"minecraft:bow"}]}] run execute unless score @s 001 matches 1 run scoreboard players set @e 001 1
execute as @e[sort=nearest,type=skeleton,distance=0..32,nbt=!{HandItems:[{id:"minecraft:bow"}]}] run execute unless score @s 001 matches 1 run scoreboard players set @e 001 2
execute as @e[type=skeleton,distance=0..3,nbt={HandItems:[{id:"minecraft:bow"}]}] run item replace entity @s weapon.mainhand with air
execute as @e[type=skeleton,distance=0..3,nbt={HandItems:[{id:"minecraft:bow"}]}] run item replace entity @s weapon.offhand with air

command_list.command: item replace entity @s weapon.mainhand with bow
item replace entity @s weapon.offhand with air
